title: AdvancementLock
description: Unlock your progress in Inventory Slots and Max Health obtaining Advancements!
body:
# AdvancementLock
## Introduction
In this mod you start with 3 slots and 3 hearts.
You unlock those slots and hearts (up to the 10 vanilla hearts) unlocking **Advancements.**

## Difficulty
On World Creation, there is a new option to change the Lock Difficulty, this affects the number of advancements to progress on unlocking all of the slots and health.

There are 3 difficulties:
  - **Easy:** Total unlock with 41.66% of total advancements.
  - **Normal:** Total unlock with 55.55% of total advancements.
  - **Hard:** Total unlock with 83.33% of total advancements.

Here is a [PDF File](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FAe8HaHT7HijwOerSU9VnXU49BEDu_to/view?usp=sharing) that shows the unlocks for Vanilla with the three difficulties.

**NOTE:** *This PDF is outdated, it is with root adv. and in 1.21.8, so the numbers may not be exact, but it is useful to have an idea of what the difficulty does.*

## Compatibility
The total advancements are calculated on world start, so it is compatible with datapacks (checked) and may be compatible with most mods (not checked).
